observed_strengths: PromptVault has a private pushed source repo and clean worktree.
CLI supports source-filtered scans for targeted source validation.
Full release scan exports 155484 prompts from 27608 files.
Tauri UI avoids returning full Markdown over IPC by default.
observed_weaknesses: Full scans still render and write a 364M Markdown export even when an agent only needs JSON stats.
The CLI has no explicit stats-only/no-export mode.
Mandatory export makes iteration slower for parser and analytics work.

selected_candidate.name: no-export scan mode
selected_candidate.reason: Preserves the full Markdown default while enabling fast stats-only automation for autoresearch and source validation.
selected_candidate.success_metric: Full JSON scan can run with markdown_written=false, markdown_included=false, no output path, and no 364M export file.
